arts.ttl: Arteta 'in love' with Arsenal target, Amorim eyes PSG star for Man Utd, Barcelona stunned: FT Recap
arts.sum: Arteta 'in love' with Arsenal target, Amorim eyes PSG star for Man Utd, Barcelona stunned: FT Recap Man Utd target January midfield transfer despite Amorim 'love' for forgotten star

arts.ttl: Every word from part two of Ruben Amorims first press conference as Man Utd head coach
arts.sum: I try to focus my players on the history of the club, not the recent history, so you have to be demanding as this is a club that needs to win. This is a different time and I cannot be the same guy that Sir Alex Ferguson was.

arts.ttl: ‘The smiling one’ Ruben Amorim says he can be ruthless when he needs to be
arts.sum: Manchester United’s new boss says there is an edge to him.

arts.ttl: 'I can be ruthless' - Ruben Amorim fires warning that cannot be ignored at Manchester United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim held his first Man Utd press conference on Friday and made a strong impression at Carrington.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sent warning by Ipswich captain Sam Morsy as Ruben Amorim targets debut victory
arts.sum: IPSWICH TOWN vs MANCHESTER UNITED: Tractor Boys captain Sam Morsy wants Kieran McKenna's side to get after new-look United from the off on Sunday at Portman Road following their recent Premier League victory at Tottenham as they bid to spoil Ruben Amorim's first match at the helm

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim won't turn to Sir Alex Ferguson as he reveals Man Utd's big problem
arts.sum: New Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim is the latest to try and recapture the success Sir Alex Ferguson enjoyed during his legendary stint in the Old Trafford dugout

arts.ttl: Man Utd ready to take on Man City for Viktor Gyokeres transfer after Ruben Amorim plea
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants to add firepower to his Manchester United squad - and is targeting a move for Viktor Gyokeres after working with the striker to great effect at Sporting

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's trusted ally blasts Man Utd for 'encouraging negativity' with PR mistake
arts.sum: Rene Meulensteen believes former employers Manchester United should have issued a statement explaining why they were axing club legend Sir Alex Ferguson's ambassadorial contract when they made the surprise call in October

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim delivers stark warning to fans as he claims it will take time to make Man United great again
arts.sum: Amorin was a toddler two months short of his second birthday when Sir Alex Ferguson took charge of his first game as Manchester United manager at Oxford United 38 years ago this month.

arts.ttl: THE SHARPE END: Can Ruben Amorim reignite the back-three boom? And how will the Man United boss make his players fit into their new formation?
arts.sum: THE SHARPE END: Haven't you heard? New Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim likes to play with a back three. How exciting. Well, he's part of a rarer breed of elite manager.
